item.title: fc_mossman: Spencer Mossman @fc_mossman · 35s Since the start of last season, nobody in top 5 leagues has more goals from dribbles t
item.description:
Spencer Mossman @fc_mossman · 35s Since the start of last season, nobody in top 5 leagues has more goals from dribbles than Yan Diomande.
Not Jamie Bynoe-Gittens, not Lamine Yamal, not Kylian Mbappe, not Michael Olise... Yan Diomande.
Full eye test + data breakdown of his game Cita beyond90 @beyond90ftbl · 3min New Video
Yan Diomande isn't just a Cinderella story—he's a tactical cheat code. We dive into the underlying data to see exactly why Liverpool,Man United and others are after him.
Is the Bundesliga tax real, or is he the complete package?
Video Below 9

item.title: TomCantonMedia: Tom Canton @TomCantonMedia · 39s I asked Arteta about struggling to break through City's setup in the final, and what ha
item.description:
Tom Canton @TomCantonMedia · 39s I asked Arteta about struggling to break through City's setup in the final, and what has been learned since?
"They've done it in the past. There are some moments that we are so low we didn't make the right decisions." De football.london 1 3 73

item.title: TomCantonMedia: Tom Canton @TomCantonMedia · 38s En respuesta a @TomCantonMedia "Sometimes we break that press and then we didn't take
item.description: Tom Canton @TomCantonMedia · 38s En respuesta a @TomCantonMedia "Sometimes we break that press and then we didn't take advantage of that. Every tactic has its issues, its opportunities as well and in relation to what they do, we will adapt, and we will do the same." 38

item.title: alex_crook: Alex Crook @alex_crook · 2min EXC: Marco Rose to #AFCB close to being fully agreed. Club moved quickly to identify top
item.description:
Alex Crook @alex_crook · 2min EXC: Marco Rose to #AFCB close to being fully agreed. Club moved quickly to identify top target after Iraola confirmed his pending exit. @talkSPORT
@JacobsBen Cita Alex Crook @alex_crook · 14 abr. Former Dortmund boss Marco Rose is a leading contender to replace the outgoing Andoni Iraola. Ipswich's Kieran McKenna is another potential option #AFCB 2 14 1 mil

item.title:
JacobsBen: Ben Jacobs @JacobsBen · 2min Exclusive: Bournemouth are close to appointing Marco Rose as their new manager.
The Cherr
item.description:
Ben Jacobs @JacobsBen · 2min Exclusive: Bournemouth are close to appointing Marco Rose as their new manager.
The Cherries quickly identified Rose as their preferred choice after Andoni Iraola told them he was leaving at the end of the season.
Barring any late hitches, a formal agreement is expected Mostrar más 12 23 141 3 mil
